name: Synthetic edge or telecom data-center archetype
source: OSM data-center tags plus conservative data-center engineering load-density assumptions
assumptions: Used when a tagged data-center proxy has no usable building footprint or public capacity evidence.

name: Synthetic named commercial data-center archetype
source: OSM data-center names/operators plus conservative commercial data-center engineering assumptions
assumptions: Used when a named data-center proxy has weak or missing floor-area evidence; capped below hyperscale range.

name: Synthetic large industrial data-center archetype
source: OSM data-center tags with large footprint/industrial proxy plus conservative hyperscale cap
assumptions: Used when floor-area evidence suggests a large facility; capped to avoid absurd inferred site load.
